name: A Geometric Perspective on Stabilizing Value Conflict Resolution

description: arXiv:2607.17946v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often struggle to navigate value conflicts when trained with the compressed scalar rewards of Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). To address this challenge, we investigate how chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning can help improve performance in this domain. Geometrically, we show that CoT correlates with f...
author: Saket Reddy, Andy Liu
